title: vanda spathulata
intro: Vanda spathulata is a species of orchid, specifically a type of terrestrial orchid native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vanda spathulata are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and help manage digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Vanda spathulata typically involve boiling the plant in water to create a tea or infusion that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
